Header file for defining Git version information with placeholders for timestamp, tag, and version details.

# Purpose
This header file defines a set of preprocessor macros related to version control information. It includes macros for `GIT_TIMESTAMP`, `GIT_TAG`, `GIT_MAJOR_VERSION`, `GIT_MINOR_VERSION`, `GIT_PATCH_VERSION`, and `GIT_REVISION`. These macros are placeholders that are intended to be replaced with actual values during the build process. The file is used to embed versioning and build metadata into a software application, allowing the application to access and display its version information. This is useful for tracking and managing different versions of the software.
